name: Noteify
description: A feature-rich planner app with drag-and-drop sticky notes, real-time weather, live clock, and location awareness. Built for productivity with a playful, tactile interface.

name: Instrument Store
tagline: Where music meets the modern web
description: An online instrument shop with a jazzy, editorial design. Showcases product listings, smooth carousels, and a carefully crafted checkout experience.

name: Animalist
description: An anime search engine powered by the Jikan API with a stunning parallax landing page, smooth scroll transitions, and rich media cards.
